# Sponsor Sigil

Sigil provides cryptographic audit trails for AI agents — tamper-evident, hash-chained, Ed25519-signed. Open source under MIT.

## Why Sponsor?

Your sponsorship keeps Sigil free and actively maintained. Funds go directly to:
- Continued development of the SDK and MCP server
- New integrations with agent frameworks
- Documentation and guides
- Infrastructure for the hosted verification service

## Tiers

### $5/month — Supporter
- Name in SPONSORS.md
- Early access to new features

### $15/month — Builder
- Everything in Supporter
- Priority issue responses
- Access to private Discord channel

### $50/month — Architect
- Everything in Builder
- Monthly 30-min architecture call
- Logo on README
- Input on roadmap priorities

## One-Time

Custom amounts welcome for one-time contributions.

## Contact

Questions about sponsorship? Email slythefoxvibes@proton.me
